channel.title: flove making-of — puzzy questions
channel.description: New puzzy design questions from flove interviews.

item.title: How should puzzy aggregate ratings from multiple people?
item.description:
• Juxtaposition — Show all raters side by side. Transparent, but cluttered with many raters. • Mean + dispersion — Statistical summary — average + spread. Clean, hides individual nuance. • Toggle — User switches between juxtaposition and summary. Most flexible, more UI. • Defer — Don't decide yet — wait until F3/F5 when puzzy ships.
★ decided: — · ◇ recommended: Defer

item.title: Where does the puzzy compute live?
item.description:
• Client-only — All compute in the browser. Privacy-first, limited by device power. • Module-42-only — Server-side compute. Powerful, centralized, requires trust. • Hybrid with offline cache — Client-first, server fallback, offline cache. Balanced, complex. • Defer — Don't decide yet — wait until F5.
★ decided: — · ◇ recommended: Defer
